items.title: Sam LaPorta: Cleared for training camp
items.body_text: LaPorta (herniated disc) was fully cleared earlier this month, Jeremy Fowler of ESPN.com reports. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.

items.title: Jacoby Brissett: Contract still unresolved
items.body_text: Brissett and the Cardinals have yet to work out a new contract ahead of players reporting for training camp Wednesday, Ian Rapoport of NFL Network reports. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.

items.title: Nico Collins: Injury-free entering camp
items.body_text: Collins said his workload limitations during the offseason were not injury related, and that he was simply being rested ahead of training camp, Kevin Patra of NFL.com reports. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.

items.title: Jordyn Brooks: Agrees to three-year extension
items.body_text: Brooks and the Dolphins agreed to terms Tuesday on a three-year, $51.3 million contract extension, Adam Schefter of ESPN reports. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.

items.title: Sam LaPorta: Primed for TE-friendly scheme
items.body_text: LaPorta (back) is expected to be full go for training camp after he was limited during OTAs and minicamp while rehabbing from back surgery, Tim Twentyman of the Lions' official site reports. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.
